release_notes: **Shop setting: "Show sell totals in matrix"** — new checkbox in Admin → Shop Settings (Regional card, under UI Scale). When off, the matrix TOTAL column and the value portion of the per-part-type cards + the grand-total card are hidden, so shop assistants see stock counts without seeing sell valuation. Units stay visible either way. Cost mode (PIN-gated via 👁) overrides the hide so the cost/sell comparison still makes sense when the owner has authenticated.; Persisted via `ShopConfig.show_sell_totals` (reuses the existing `app_config` key-value mechanism — no DB migration needed).; Typed accessor `ShopConfig.is_show_sell_totals`.
